title: Heartless Horizon Plugin
body:
> Disclaimer: This is an unofficial remake of the Heartless Horizon plugin concept. I am not affiliated with the original Heartless Horizon server or team. This plugin is a fan-made recreation and I do not claim any credit for the original gameplay concept.

💛 **Quexo's Heartless Horizon Recreation!**

**❓How HH Works:**
Each time you die, you lose 2 Permanent hearts, and the hearts next to your user change color too based on how many hearts you have.

**🔖 Have Hearts Next To Your User!**

- 20 hearts → 💜 Purple
- 10 hearts → 💚 Green
- 8-9 hearts → 💛 Yellow-Green
- 6-7 hearts → 💛 Yellow
- 4-5 hearts → 🧡 Orange
- 1-3 hearts → ❤️ Red
- 0 hearts → 🖤 Black [Immortal But Can Take Damage, Only Obtainable Via Command!]
- infinite hearts → 🤍 White [Immortal, Can't Take Damage, Only Obtainable Via Command!]

🎟️ **HH - Commands:**

- /sethearts [User] [Amount] Set that player's amount of Hearts [0-20]
- /last [User] Just like in the official series, it will replace the player's heart next to his user with a "⚠️" of the same color of his heart amount, if they have this, no matter how many hearts they have, next time they die they get automatically banned.
- /heartless [User] make the player's hearts Black, making him immortal but capable of taking damage.
- /immortal [User] Make the player's hearts White, making it so that he's immortal and can't take damage, even if in survival.

🎫 **Other Features:**
- Wither Death Sound
- Hearts Visible Both in Chat, Above User, And In TAB List!
